message:
refactor(core): add scope-free convenience methods for read_group_desc, read_inode, read_inode_attr, read_dir, and lookup_name

Add parameter-free overloads that pass RequestScope::empty() internally,
so callers that don't need MVCC scoping can call the simpler API without
constructing an empty scope. The _with_scope variants remain for callers
that need explicit isolation control. Internal references updated to use
the _with_scope naming where a scope is already available.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
